# Notes

This page demonstrates wiki links and callouts.

> [!NOTE]
> Wiki links let you reference other files by name, no paths needed.

See the main [[README]] or the [[getting-started]] guide.

> [!WARNING]
> Wiki links are case-insensitive. `[[README]]` and `[[readme]]` both work.

> [!CAUTION]
> Broken wiki links like `[[does-not-exist]]` render as plain text, not broken links.
